assessment_basis: Declared scores are imported from the previous review only as an unverified snapshot. Candidate files and commands are not completion evidence until repository-external, hash-bound receipts verify them. Repository verification receipts are capped at E4; E5 requires a separate site or organization attestation.

areas.name: Research operating model and end-to-end flow

blockers.acceptance: No future information can reach a decision or same-bar favorable fill.
blockers.verification_expectation: Causal view, event timeline, suffix-invariance and leakage tests.

blockers.acceptance: Code, data, parameters, environment, costs, seed, universe, and time policy are fixed and compared on replay.
blockers.verification_expectation: Strict reproduction receipt and drift paths.

blockers.acceptance: Hypothesis, strategy, experiment, and result history is append-only/versioned.
blockers.verification_expectation: Hash chains, create-or-verify publication, overwrite rejection.

blockers.rubric_title: 백테스트와 모의·실거래가 다른 전략 로직을 사용함
blockers.acceptance: One strategy contract is the authority for every supported execution surface.

blockers.rubric_title: 데이터 품질 실패가 연구를 차단하지 않음
blockers.acceptance: Failed data quality blocks validation, not merely logs a warning.
blockers.verification_expectation: Quality gate integration and negative tests.

blockers.rubric_title: 실거래 위험 변경에 승인과 감사 기록이 없음
blockers.acceptance: Any live-risk increase requires independent approval and immutable audit evidence.
blockers.verification_expectation: Approval, separation-of-duty, race, rollback and bypass tests on the actual live path.

blockers.acceptance: One automated hypothesis-to-validation/review flow preserves every ID/hash and retry identity.
A blank-environment restore drill verifies DB/object references and replays a representative study.
blockers.verification_expectation: Signed recovery receipt plus measured site drill.

criteria.acceptance: Observation, question, hypothesis, exploration, fixed experiment, run, judgment, strategy, TradePlan, Order, Fill and ExecutionReview responsibilities are distinct.
criteria.verification_expectation: Domain, service, reference and full E2E lineage tests.

criteria.acceptance: An observation has provenance/status and cannot masquerade as validated fact.
A question owns competing immutable hypothesis versions; failed siblings remain visible.
Exploration, preregistered validation, and final holdout are visibly and technically separated.

criteria.rubric_title: 최종 연구 산출물이 실행 가능한 규칙인가
criteria.acceptance: A promoted strategy is a complete executable rule contract with scope, timing, sizing, exits, risk, and suspension.

One repeatable E2E covers question, observation, hypothesis, snapshot, spec, backtest, result, judgment, strategy, simulated candidate, TradePlan, fill, review and monitoring while preserving every ID and retry identity.
criteria.verification_expectation: Full production-service E2E or reproducible demo.

criteria.acceptance: ResearchQuestion through MonitoringState, including TradePlan, Order, Fill, Position and ExecutionReview, have separate typed responsibilities rather than arbitrary JSON.
Stable internal IDs, logical IDs, version IDs, and external IDs are distinct.
Hypothesis, feature, strategy, cost, and experiment changes create immutable versions with diffs/bindings.
Run→spec→hypothesis→dataset, strategy→approved result, TradePlan→strategy, Fill→Order and Review→plan/fills references fail closed.
Completed/approved objects, fill≤order, plan risk, retired-strategy planning and failed-data validation invariants are enforced in code.
criteria.verification_expectation: Domain/service/DB negative tests, not UI checks.

criteria.rubric_title: 도메인 모델과 API·DB 모델이 과도하게 결합되지 않았는가
criteria.acceptance: Domain, API DTO, ORM, and infrastructure mappings stay explicit and one-way.

criteria.rubric_title: 시간의 의미가 타입과 필드 수준에서 구분되는가
criteria.acceptance: Event, knowledge, collection, processing, decision, submission, fill, trading-day and timezone meanings are explicit.
Currency, price, quantity, return, bps/pct, tick/lot and numeric precision are explicit.
Hypothesis and strategy lifecycle states are closed enums with documented meaning.
Allowed transitions and terminal/new-version rules are explicit.
Every transition checks stage-specific evidence and approval prerequisites.
Prior/new state, actor, time, reason, evidence and approval identity are immutable.
Concurrent/retried transitions use CAS/idempotency and cannot duplicate or move backward.
Raw, normalized, PIT, feature, frozen research dataset, and output responsibilities are explicit for supported data.
Provider/release/request/acquisition/response/hash/code/error provenance is retained or explicitly externally owned.

criteria.rubric_title: 원천 데이터가 불변 또는 추가 전용으로 관리되는가
criteria.acceptance: Source versions are immutable/additive; corrections never overwrite prior evidence.
Instrument identity is internal and supports vendor mappings and lifecycle metadata without string identity leakage.
Supported corporate/product events preserve raw/adjusted policy and event/publication time; unsupported classes reject.
Calendar/session/timezone policy has one authority and rejects unsupported sessions.
Every field's type, unit, meaning, nullability, range, availability, provenance, version, and owner is documented/validated.
Features declare input, formula, current-bar rule, warm-up, missing/outlier policy, availability, version and consumers.

criteria.rubric_title: 연구 데이터셋을 불변 스냅샷으로 만들 수 있는가
criteria.acceptance: Frozen datasets bind universe/scope, period, fields, features, filters, source, transform, time, hash and quality.

criteria.rubric_title: 데이터 품질 상태가 연구 실행과 연결되는가
criteria.acceptance: PASS/WARN/RESTRICTED/FAILED/STALE semantics gate each supported use and audit overrides.

criteria.rubric_title: 데이터 저장 방식이 규모와 접근 패턴에 적합한가
criteria.acceptance: Analytical bytes and metadata use appropriate stores, stable references, retention, and safe cleanup.
Event time and availability/knowledge time are distinct and `available_at <= decision_at` is enforced.
Listed/index/tradable/ETF membership, financial availability, ticker and instrument attributes reproduce exactly as of the decision time.
criteria.verification_expectation: Universe membership and attribute PIT fixtures.

criteria.acceptance: Delisted/inactive instruments, membership history, last-price/liquidation assumptions, ETF liquidation and mergers remain in historical studies.
Git commit, dirty state/diff identity, package/strategy/processing code are bound to every run.
criteria.verification_expectation: Code provenance and strict reproduction tests.

criteria.acceptance: Runtime, lock, OS/image, result-affecting env, libraries, timezone and locale are recorded and compared.
Seeds, ordering, queries, parallel merge and identical-input determinism are controlled.
Metrics, trades, equity, parameters, logs, errors, judgment, environment and data hashes are immutable run artifacts.

criteria.rubric_title: 데이터 계보를 역방향과 정방향으로 추적할 수 있는가
criteria.acceptance: Lineage is queryable both result→source and source correction→affected result/package.
Reproduce uses frozen inputs and reports exact code/environment/data/result drift.
Experiment spec binds hypothesis version, frozen data, periods, rules, costs/fills, sizing, benchmark, metrics, gates, robustness, seed, author and version.

criteria.rubric_title: 사전 등록 또는 동결 기능이 있는가
criteria.acceptance: Dataset, parameters, gates, validation period, metrics and exclusions freeze before validation; edits require a new version.
Run status, times, inputs, code/environment/data, outputs, errors, parent/retry relation are immutable.
Long execution is outside HTTP, durable, observable, cancellable, restart-safe and retry-safe.
Concurrent runs isolate work/files/state and enforce deterministic CPU/memory limits.
Failures use bounded searchable codes for data, quality, config, code, resource, cancel, timeout, storage and authorization classes.
Retry semantics are explicit, idempotent, and never promote partial output.

criteria.rubric_title: 탐색 노트북을 정식 코드로 승격하는 경로가 있는가
criteria.acceptance: Notebook exploration can only be promoted through extracted production code, tests and registered spec; runtime imports are forbidden.
Run comparison explains parameter, data, code, signal, fill, cost, metric and regime differences.
Per-bar data arrival, decision, submission, fill, accounting, and exit precedence form one explicit event order.

criteria.rubric_title: 동일 봉의 미래 가격을 사용하지 않는가
criteria.acceptance: Same-bar close/high/low/volume and favorable gap assumptions cannot leak future facts.
Signal, intent, risk/sizing, order request, fill and portfolio are separate authorities.
Supported costs model side, fees, spread/slippage, delay, liquidity and version/source; zero cannot hide as default.
Supported order types, partial/unfilled/cancel/tick/limit behavior are explicit; unsupported semantics reject.
Gap and unknown intrabar path use conservative/explicit policy or reject ambiguity.
Cash reservation, fills, fees/tax, average cost, partial exits, realized/unrealized P&L and valuation reconcile.
Position sizing enforces cash, stop/volatility risk, concentration, portfolio limits, lots and insufficient funds.
Benchmark uses the same period, currency, tradability, cash/dividend/cost and rebalance policy.

criteria.rubric_title: 벡터 엔진과 이벤트 엔진의 역할이 구분되는가
criteria.acceptance: Any vector exploration and event validation share signal rules and explain result differences.
criteria.verification_expectation: Engine parity or explicit single-engine contract.

criteria.acceptance: Dedicated leakage tests cover delay, future columns, publication, ordering, current bar, normalization and holdout.
Dedicated selection/survivorship tests cover delisted instruments, index/ETF membership changes, contemporaneous volume/cap filters and missing-instrument retention.
Fixed regression data locks signal/order/fill/quantity/cost/cash/equity/final return with reviewed updates.
Train/explore, validation and final holdout purposes do not overlap; exposure is audited and post-view edits version.
Walk-forward windows, steps, reselection, fold results, combined results and overlap handling are deterministic.
Supported cross-time/instrument/market/regime generalization is tested; unsupported scope is explicit.
Parameter surfaces, ranges, steps, neighborhoods and sharp optima are stored and gated.
Optimistic/base/conservative/stress costs, delay, partial fills and liquidity are evaluated.
Top trades, period/regime/instrument/calendar contribution and outlier removal expose concentration.
Results decompose by declared market regimes and post-hoc regimes become new hypotheses.
Trade count, win/loss, payoff, net expectancy, median/extremes, holding, MFE/MAE, slippage and time/capital expectancy are explicit or unavailable.
Return, annualization, drawdown/duration/recovery, volatility/downside, exposure/turnover/cash/concentration/beta/tail/risk adjustment are explicit or unavailable.
Sample size, confidence/bootstrap/sequence ranges, regimes, live sample, cost and parameter uncertainty accompany estimates.
Pass/hold/reject is automatically derived from preregistered metrics with reasons retained.
Logical strategy lineage and immutable strategy version are distinct.
Every promotable version binds hypothesis, final experiment, snapshot, code, result, approval, scope and suspension.
Signal, sizing, risk, order, exit and portfolio responsibilities have single authorities.

criteria.rubric_title: 백테스트와 운영에서 동일한 전략 계약을 사용하는가
criteria.acceptance: Backtest, paper and live execution consume one strategy signal→intent→risk/order contract with no divergent rule copy.
Instrument, interval, frequency, regime, liquidity, order type, capital and environment scope are explicit and enforced.

criteria.rubric_title: 전략 상태와 거래 가능 여부가 연결되는가
criteria.acceptance: Lifecycle state controls every supported promotion/export/action; suspended/retired cannot create new action.
Per-trade/day/strategy/instrument/portfolio loss and exposure limits are immutable and actually executed.
Version change, in-flight policy, action version, rollback approval and historical evaluation remain safe and auditable.

criteria.rubric_title: 장 시작 전 후보 생성이 가능한가
criteria.acceptance: Pre-session candidates show version, reason, data time, regime, prices, exits, expiry, size, risk, analogues and state.
Immutable TradePlan exists before any order with full rule/risk/actor/history fields.
Approve/hold/reject reason is classified and retained.
Intraday view is rule/risk/freshness/plan-delta centered, not P&L centered.
Every plan change stores before/after, actor, time and reason.

criteria.rubric_title: 장 마감 후 계획과 실제를 자동 비교하는가
criteria.acceptance: Plan, order, fill, missed/off-rule action, expected/actual cost/slippage and counterfactual compare automatically.
Rule adherence/judgment quality is separate from realized outcome.

criteria.rubric_title: 누락 거래와 규칙 외 거래가 관리되는가
criteria.acceptance: Missed, unsolicited, delayed, oversized, stop-delayed, early-exit and re-entry deviations are retained.
Theoretical, costed backtest, paper and actual outcomes compare in parallel.
Signal/data/delay/fill/cost/size/human/regime/code causes explain deltas.
Recent expectancy/win/payoff/frequency/holding/drawdown/streak/cost/slippage drift against history.

criteria.rubric_title: 입력 데이터와 시장 상태 드리프트를 측정하는가
criteria.acceptance: Volatility/volume/spread/correlation/universe/signal/feature/freshness/missing-input drift is separate.
State-change thresholds are preregistered, versioned and evidence-bound.
Sample count, confidence, historical streak/drawdown, regime and window prevent premature conclusions.
Alert→acknowledge→investigate→state restriction→revalidate→approved release is one audited workflow.
Research notes are immutable/versioned and reference hypothesis, observation, data, feature, experiment, strategy, run, regime and literature IDs.
Negative, failed, aborted and falsified results remain visible with typed reason.
Material changes record what/why/evidence/alternatives/effect/risk/approver/version.
Architecture decisions have status, context, choice, alternatives and consequences.
Overview, architecture, methodology, dictionary, lifecycle, authoring, reproduction, operations, incident, recovery, security, deploy/rollback and limits match code.
CI runs documented commands and detects stale links, API/schema drift and removed-module references.
Authentication, authorization, hypothesis/spec/approval/risk/quality/suspension/deletion/recovery actions reach immutable audit evidence.
Dashboard prioritizes review, failures, completed work, approvals and warnings.
UI uses user-work language with technical evidence in advanced detail.
Core decisions are concise while hashes, commit, parameters, environment, logs and raw data expand on demand.
Errors identify object, failed rule, consequence and next action without leaking secrets.
Queued/running/progress/cancelling/completed/failed/retry/log state survives refresh.
Request/response, error, pagination/filter/sort/version/auth/idempotency and async status contracts are explicit for exposed APIs.
GUI mutation always uses application/domain services, never direct rule bypass.
Keyboard, contrast, non-color state, labels, confirmation, sorting/filtering, timezone and units support desktop work.
Per-user auth, secure credential/SSO, expiry/logout, throttle, disabled users and no default accounts.
Viewer/researcher/reviewer/operator/admin duties and separation prevent self-approval or evidence mutation.
Required project/team/strategy/data/environment ownership is enforced, not inferred from IDs.
Data/gate/strategy/risk/reactivation/quality and any future connection change requires appropriate approval.
Secrets stay outside Git/UI/log/error and examples contain placeholders only.
Development/test/production DB, secrets, stores and capability flags are isolated and visibly identified.
Dangerous capabilities default off, display environment, enforce limits/idempotency/confirmation and expose emergency stop only in reviewed scope.
Version-pinned reproducible web/API/worker/PostgreSQL deployment has health, ordering, init and migration.
Environment, paths, DB, timezone, log, cost and feature settings are external while invariants remain code-enforced.
Migrations are versioned, forward-safe, recoverable, backup-gated and tested with existing data.
Logs consistently include time/level/service/correlation/actor/run/strategy/dataset/error and redact secrets.
Availability, latency/error, queue/runtime, freshness/quality, experiment/storage/DB and alerts have bounded metrics.
Every alert has severity, owner, diagnosis, action, recovery, escalation and runbook; routing is site-proven.
DB, artifacts, inputs, config, audit and secret-recovery policy have fenced signed backups and retention/legal hold.
A clean restore verifies integrity, point-in-time/reference consistency, representative replay and measured duration.
API/worker failures isolate, restarts recover durable state, partial jobs are visible and resources bounded.

criteria.rubric_title: WSL 개발 환경과 운영 환경의 차이가 관리되는가
criteria.acceptance: WSL/Linux path, permission, newline, timezone, volume and dependency differences are explicit and tested.
Unit tests cover returns, features, signals, exits, sizing, costs, accounting and time policy.
Exact thresholds, zero/insufficient values, missing warm-up, lifecycle edges, gaps and dual-hit cases are covered.
Generated/property tests enforce OHLC, monotonic costs/slippage, fill<=order, accounting and determinism invariants.
Duplicate, missing, range, freshness, schema, references, mapping, events, calendar and anomalous changes gate data.
Dedicated leakage suite covers decision/order/publication/universe/current-bar/normalization/target/holdout.
Fixed datasets lock signals, trades, fills, costs, equity and metrics.
Freeze→experiment→result→strategy and monitoring/state integrations use production services.
Browser E2E covers login, upload/hypothesis, execution/status, result, review and approval for in-scope flow.
API/application tests cover schema/error/auth/idempotency/pagination/concurrency/not-found/state/async.
Empty install, prior-version upgrade, transform, recovery and representative post-migration run are tested.
DB/storage/worker/disk/duplicate/restart and permitted external-timeout failures are injected.
Auth bypass, object access, ID guessing, injection/path traversal, secret leakage and audit omission fail.
CI requires format/lint/type/unit/quality/leakage/regression/integration/security/migration/docs checks.
Tests exercise real repositories/services/strategies/migrations/engines, using mocks only at external seams.
Small deterministic fixtures cover events, gaps, partial fills, timezones, quality failures and review cases with documented derivation.
Apps, services, domain/data/features/research/backtest/portfolio/execution/report/infra/tests/docs have clear owners.
UI/API→application→domain and infrastructure→interfaces; core never imports web/DB/operations.
Package cycles and unbounded common/utils sharing are detected.
Exit/cost/calendar/state/risk/feature rules have one executable authority.
Provider/path/env/flags/defaults are configuration; accounting/state/time/approval/integrity cannot be disabled.
Dataset, storage, experiment tracking, messaging, authentication and any future execution system are adapters.
Scan/cache/parallel/queue/priority/storage/index/pagination/memory boundaries are measurable and separable.

criteria.rubric_title: 선물 확장에 필요한 모델 경계가 준비되어 있는가
criteria.acceptance: Instrument/position boundaries do not preclude contract, expiry, multiplier, margin, settlement, roll, basis and sessions; unsupported derivatives reject.

criteria.rubric_title: 옵션 확장에 필요한 모델 경계가 준비되어 있는가
criteria.acceptance: Instrument/position boundaries do not preclude option type, strike, expiry, underlying, multiplier, Greeks/IV, legs and payoff; unsupported options reject.
Any AI remains provenance-bound advisory output requiring human review and cannot approve/mutate/hide evidence.
Unsupported scope, accuracy limits, temporary paths, owner/reason/priority debt and removal paths are explicit.
